title: Schylling Teenie NeeDoh Cool Cats (3 Pack) - Mini Squishy Animals Fidget Toys, 8 Assorted Colours & Styles, Nee Doh Stress Balls For Anxiety Relief, Safe & Non-Toxic Dough; 3 Year Olds +
features: NEE-DOH COOL CAT FIDGETS - Have fun kitten around with NeeDoh’s Cool Cats fidget toy set; includes 3 miniature NeeDoh with cute cat facial features; available in 8 colours & styles (chosen at random)
SENSORY SQUISH TOYS FOR KIDS - Sized for small hands, Teenie NeeDoh helps youngsters unwind and de-stress; ideal as an anxiety reliever and also helps to improve children’s concentration skills
NOVELTY FIDGET BALL GIFT - NeeDoh squeeze toys from Schylling make fabulously fun birthday gifts, Christmas presents and stocking fillers for children aged 3+ years old
SAFE TOYS - Squidgy fidget toy sensation NeeDoh is made with a silky soft, stretchy texture and filled with a safe, non-toxic, dough-like material; conforms to EN71 Toy Safety Standards
SCHYLLING - Schylling is an award-winning toy company from Boston, USA; for over 40 years, Schylling has specialised in creating timeless toys, inspired by the inventions that shaped our childhoods
description: From the brand NeeDoh NeeDoh The Groovy Glob, by Schylling. Previous page Schylling is an award-winning toy company from Boston, Massachusetts, in the USA. For over forty years, Schylling has specialised in creating timeless retro kids toys, inspired by the inventions that shaped our childhoods. Schylling toys are ideal as stocking fillers, party favours and novelty birthday gifts. In 2017, Schylling created NeeDoh The Groovy Glob which has rapidly grown to be a recognised brand. The TikTok sensation, NeeDoh! This groovy glob is available in a range of exciting colours and has a silky smooth texture that is filled with a dough-like material. Next page
